summary.lv: GR8 Tech (iGaming) attālināti meklē Middle Client Delivery Manager, kas vada B2B klientu integrāciju projektus, optimizē piegādes procesus un veido un mentorē 10+ tehnisko ekspertu komandu.
summary.en: GR8 Tech (iGaming) is hiring a remote Middle Client Delivery Manager to orchestrate B2B client-integration projects, optimise delivery processes, and grow and mentor a team of 10+ technical experts.
